q: How does Radhe packers and movers work?
a: Tell us your pickup and drop city, house size and moving date. We instantly show quotes from verified vendors near you. Pick one, book in a tap, track live, and pay after delivery.
Every vendor goes through KYC, document checks, and a quality audit before listing. We continuously monitor ratings and remove under-performing vendors.

q: What if my belongings are damaged?
a: Every booking comes with ₹5 lakh damage protection. If something is damaged during transit, we'll process your claim within 72 hours.
Pricing depends on distance, house size, floor, packing needs and add-ons. All vendors show fully itemised, transparent quotes — no hidden charges.
Yes — free cancellation or rescheduling up to 24 hours before your move. Check your booking page for cut-off times.
Yes. Every truck on our platform has GPS tracking. You and your family can watch the move in real time from the app.
Radhe packers and movers currently covers 120+ cities across India including Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, Pune, Ahmedabad, Hyderabad, Chennai, and Kolkata.
Pay after delivery via UPI, card, netbanking or cash. Advance is never mandatory on Radhe packers and movers.
